response.justification: The candidate is a strong, versatile senior full-stack engineer with genuine testing culture and community mentoring, but the profile does not match this role's core requirements. C++ experience is limited to roughly seven months at National Instruments plus a thesis project, far short of the required 8 years. Large-scale distributed systems exposure is real but brief (~2 years of low-latency work at Sociomantic, in D rather than C++), and there is no production cloud platform architecture or formal technical-leadership track record mentoring cloud/DevOps engineers.
strengths: High-throughput, low-latency systems experience at Sociomantic (millions of requests/sec)
Strong engineering practices: TDD, CI/CD, trunk-based development, plus authored testing tools
Proven mentoring and knowledge-sharing via workshops, courses, and conference talks
concerns: C++ experience (~7 months professional) falls far below the 8-year minimum requirement
No demonstrated cloud compute platform or production cloud architecture ownership
No formal technical-leadership role leading strategy or managing priorities across teams
